trade_signals: India export demand, shipping lanes, and customs policy are clustered into one view.
Trade stories are ranked from public RSS feeds and refreshed by the hourly snapshot job.
The setup is ready to scale from the starter stock list toward broader Nifty 500 coverage.

items.title: Trade headlines will appear here after the first workflow run.
items.summary: The first scheduled refresh will replace this placeholder with the latest trade summary.
items.detailed_summary: The first scheduled refresh will replace this placeholder with the latest trade summary. Once the workflow runs, each article card will include a short overview, a more detailed summary, and a direct link to the original source.

items.title: India business and finance updates will populate here.
items.summary: The first scheduled refresh will replace this placeholder with India business summaries.
items.detailed_summary: The first scheduled refresh will replace this placeholder with India business summaries. The dashboard will keep the original source link clickable and will show a longer explanation under each article card.

items.title: Global business and macro coverage will populate here.
items.summary: The first scheduled refresh will replace this placeholder with global business summaries.
items.detailed_summary: The first scheduled refresh will replace this placeholder with global business summaries. After the workflow runs, each story will include a readable overview and an expandable detailed summary tied to the original article.

meta.note: The workflow will replace this seeded snapshot with live public-market data.
